Your agent session id (sessionId): {{sessionIdShort}}

[CONTEXT RECOVERY] Your conversation was compacted. Follow your SOP's Context Recovery Protocol:
1. Re-load your agent profile to refresh SOP instructions
2. Check your assigned tasks: devchain_list_assigned_epics_tasks(agentName={your_agent_name})
3. For each in-progress task, read the full epic and ALL comments to recover context
4. Resume work from your last checkpoint comment
